text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I, the Overlord, am determined to be<n>reborn new
and true. Just at this<n>critical moment, I detect signs
of<n>Poseidon's coming from the sea...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
But contemptibly, what appears<n>instead is the
Golden Generation's<n>Phantom Bird, El Condor
Pasa—arisen<n>to educate me in the ways of combat!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I meet the wrestler head-on. And then<n>I see
clearly—this is how a ruler does<n>battle! The truly
strong do not fear to<n>be a target, no matter how
vexing it<n>may be.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I have now learned how I must<n>fight as the
Overlord—no—as the<n>Centurial Overlord!
